search.title: Ledger entries
search.selectAccountsPrompt: Select one or more accounts to search their entries.

notice.voided: This ledger entry has been voided by another ledger entry.
notice.reversed: This ledger entry has been reversed by another ledger entry.
notice.correctionVoid: This ledger entry was created to void another ledger entry.
notice.correctionReverse: This ledger entry was created to reverse another ledger entry.

voidDialog.title: Void ledger entry?
voidDialog.body: Do you want to void this ledger entry? Doing so will create a new ledger entry that cancels out this one.

reverseDialog.title: Reverse ledger entry?
reverseDialog.body: This entry falls in a closed booking period. Reversing posts a new, visible ledger entry in the current open period that cancels it out; the original entry is kept unchanged.
